results.name: Architecture discovery
results.detail: Strategy pattern classes present: PaymentProcessor, AbstractPaymentMethod, ApplePayPaymentMethod.

results.name: Implementation contract
results.detail: Apple Pay method exposes processing, validation, refund, retry, and idempotency behavior.

results.name: Technical debt guardrail
results.detail: Known legacy debt is registered, and Apple Pay avoids hardcoded secrets plus raw payment-token logging.

results.name: API documentation
results.detail: OpenAPI spec includes endpoint, bearer auth, schemas, examples, retry headers, and expected errors.

results.name: BDD test contract
results.detail: BDD suite defines 10 Apple Pay scenarios with pytest-bdd step definitions.

results.name: Living README/docs
results.detail: README and generated quality-gate docs match the current source digest.

results.name: GitHub workflow
results.detail: Workflow runs on all branch pushes, generates docs, validates gates, runs tests, and can commit docs.
